subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained the sacred precincts of the Concourse on High! Render praise unto the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting, that thou hast become assured of the Most Exalted Beauty and hast partaken of the Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشرف بمطاف ملا اعلی حمد کن حی قیومرا که بجمال اعلی موقن شدی و از کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
